  • My Elektra Go Card

    10:25:08 AM / 00:02:17:115 Pass

    My Elektra Go Card
    07.03.2026 10:25:08 AM 07.03.2026 10:27:25 AM 00:02:17:115 · #test-id=1561
    PassCopy Elektra Go Card number from flipped card
    PassCopy Elektra Go Card number from flipped card
    Given the user is on the Elektra Go login screen
    stepDefinitions.Hooks.addScreenshot(io.cucumber.java.Scenario)
    Step evidence
    Given the user logs in using email "${wallet_default.email}" and a "${wallet_default.password}"
    stepDefinitions.Hooks.addScreenshot(io.cucumber.java.Scenario)
    Step evidence
    When the user opens Payment methods from the bottom navigation
    stepDefinitions.Hooks.addScreenshot(io.cucumber.java.Scenario)
    Step evidence
    And the user opens the Elektra Go Card
    stepDefinitions.Hooks.addScreenshot(io.cucumber.java.Scenario)
    Step evidence
    And the user flips the Elektra Go Card
    stepDefinitions.Hooks.addScreenshot(io.cucumber.java.Scenario)
    Step evidence
    And the user taps Show on the flipped card
    stepDefinitions.Hooks.addScreenshot(io.cucumber.java.Scenario)
    Step evidence
    And the user copies the Elektra Go Card number
    stepDefinitions.Hooks.addScreenshot(io.cucumber.java.Scenario)
    Step evidence
    Then the card number copied toast should be displayed
    stepDefinitions.Hooks.addScreenshot(io.cucumber.java.Scenario)
    Step evidence
    And the copied card number should be available on the clipboard
    stepDefinitions.Hooks.addScreenshot(io.cucumber.java.Scenario)
    Step evidence
    stepDefinitions.Hooks.finishScenarioRecording(io.cucumber.java.Scenario)

    10:27:25 AM / 00:30:41:954 Fail

    P2P Direct Transfer

    PassSuccessful P2P transfer with GIF to wallet contact

    Given the user is on the Elektra Go login screen

    Given the user logs in using email "${wallet_default.email}" and a "${wallet_default.password}"

    Step evidence
    When the user starts a P2P direct transfer flow
    stepDefinitions.Hooks.addScreenshot(io.cucumber.java.Scenario)
    Step evidence
    And the user selects P2P recipient "Daniel Fabian"
    stepDefinitions.Hooks.addScreenshot(io.cucumber.java.Scenario)
    Step evidence
    And the user enters P2P transfer amount "1"
    stepDefinitions.Hooks.addScreenshot(io.cucumber.java.Scenario)
    Step evidence
    And the user continues the P2P transfer
    stepDefinitions.Hooks.addScreenshot(io.cucumber.java.Scenario)
    Step evidence
    And the user adds a random GIF searching "money"
    stepDefinitions.Hooks.addScreenshot(io.cucumber.java.Scenario)
    Step evidence
    And the user confirms and sends the P2P transfer
    stepDefinitions.Hooks.addScreenshot(io.cucumber.java.Scenario)
    Step evidence
    Then the P2P transfer should complete successfully for recipient "Daniel Fabian" and amount "1"
    stepDefinitions.Hooks.addScreenshot(io.cucumber.java.Scenario)
    Step evidence
    stepDefinitions.Hooks.finishScenarioRecording(io.cucumber.java.Scenario)

    Given the user is on the Elektra Go login screen
    stepDefinitions.Hooks.addScreenshot(io.cucumber.java.Scenario)
    Step evidence
    Given the user logs in using email "${wallet_default.email}" and a "${wallet_default.password}"

    Step evidence
    And the user check the Wallet balance
    stepDefinitions.Hooks.addScreenshot(io.cucumber.java.Scenario)
    Step evidence
    When the user starts a P2P direct transfer flow
    stepDefinitions.Hooks.addScreenshot(io.cucumber.java.Scenario)
    Step evidence
    And the user selects P2P recipient "Daniel Fabian"
    stepDefinitions.Hooks.addScreenshot(io.cucumber.java.Scenario)
    Step evidence
    And the user enters P2P transfer amount "1"
    stepDefinitions.Hooks.addScreenshot(io.cucumber.java.Scenario)
    Step evidence
    And the user continues the P2P transfer
    stepDefinitions.Hooks.addScreenshot(io.cucumber.java.Scenario)
    Step evidence
    And the user adds a random text concept
    stepDefinitions.Hooks.addScreenshot(io.cucumber.java.Scenario)
    Step evidence
    And the user confirms and sends the P2P transfer
    stepDefinitions.Hooks.addScreenshot(io.cucumber.java.Scenario)
    Step evidence
    Then the P2P transfer should complete successfully for recipient "Daniel Fabian" and amount "1"
    stepDefinitions.Hooks.addScreenshot(io.cucumber.java.Scenario)
    Step evidence
    And the Wallet balance should be updated with the new balance after the transfer with the amount "1"
    stepDefinitions.Hooks.addScreenshot(io.cucumber.java.Scenario)
    Step evidence
    stepDefinitions.Hooks.finishScenarioRecording(io.cucumber.java.Scenario)
